description: Detects potential memory leaks in Python: open() calls without with-statement, collection.append/extend/add in loops, __del__ method definitions. Simplified from Rust: flags all identifier function calls and attribute calls. Cannot verify absence of with-statement context, loop containment, or __del__ naming without #match? predicate support. All direct calls and attribute calls flagged.

flag.message: Direct function call detected -- verify open() calls are inside a with-statement or try/finally block to prevent file handle leaks
